comment: Curated online sources for the MIDI knowledge base. Downloaded by scripts/extract.js into .cache/ and extracted into data/. Explicit protocol tags here override filename heuristics. Entries with unofficial:true are community mirrors of login-walled official docs.

sources.name: web-midi-api-editors-draft
sources.title: Web MIDI API (W3C Editor's Draft)
sources.summary: The latest W3C editor's draft of the Web MIDI API: requestMIDIAccess, MIDIAccess/MIDIInput/MIDIOutput interfaces, permissions, and message validity algorithms.

sources.name: web-midi-api-w3c-tr
sources.title: Web MIDI API (W3C Technical Report)
sources.summary: The published W3C Technical Report snapshot of the Web MIDI API specification.

sources.name: web-midi-api-mdn
sources.title: Web MIDI API (MDN Reference)
sources.summary: MDN's practical Web MIDI API reference: interfaces, availability, security requirements, and usage examples.

sources.name: web-midi-api-explainer
sources.title: Web MIDI API Explainer (W3C Audio WG)
sources.summary: Official W3C Audio Working Group explainer for the Web MIDI API: motivation, design decisions, and usage patterns.

sources.name: web-midi-midiaccess-mdn
sources.title: MIDIAccess Interface (MDN Reference)
sources.summary: MDN reference for MIDIAccess: inputs/outputs maps, sysexEnabled, and the statechange event.

sources.name: web-midi-midiinput-mdn
sources.title: MIDIInput Interface (MDN Reference)
sources.summary: MDN reference for MIDIInput: the midimessage event and receiving MIDI messages.

sources.name: web-midi-midioutput-mdn
sources.title: MIDIOutput Interface (MDN Reference)
sources.summary: MDN reference for MIDIOutput: send() with optional timestamp, clear(), and message validity.

sources.name: web-midi-midimessageevent-mdn
sources.title: MIDIMessageEvent Interface (MDN Reference)
sources.summary: MDN reference for MIDIMessageEvent: the data Uint8Array payload and event timing.

sources.name: web-midi-midiport-mdn
sources.title: MIDIPort Interface (MDN Reference)
sources.summary: MDN reference for MIDIPort: state/connection properties, open()/close(), and the statechange event.

sources.name: web-midi-midiconnectionevent-mdn
sources.title: MIDIConnectionEvent Interface (MDN Reference)
sources.summary: MDN reference for MIDIConnectionEvent: hot-plug connect/disconnect notifications via statechange.

sources.name: m1-midi-1-0-detailed-specification
sources.title: MIDI 1.0 Detailed Specification, Document Version 4.2.1
sources.summary: The complete official MIDI 1.0 protocol specification (96-1-4): hardware, message formats, channel voice/mode messages, system messages, and running status.

sources.name: usb-midi-1-0-device-class
sources.title: USB Device Class Definition for MIDI Devices, Release 1.0
sources.summary: Official USB-IF class definition for USB-MIDI 1.0: event packets, endpoint descriptors, and MIDI 1.0 byte stream embedding over USB.

sources.name: rfc6295-rtp-midi
sources.title: RFC 6295: RTP Payload Format for MIDI (RTP-MIDI)
sources.summary: Official IETF standard for transporting MIDI 1.0 over networks with RTP, including the recovery journal for packet loss.

sources.name: m2-100-u-midi-2-0-specification-overview
sources.title: MIDI 2.0 Specification Overview
sources.summary: Top-level overview of the MIDI 2.0 specification family: how UMP, MIDI-CI, Profiles, and Property Exchange fit together.

sources.name: m2-101-um-midi-ci-specification
sources.title: MIDI Capability Inquiry (MIDI-CI) Specification
sources.summary: Bidirectional negotiation protocol for MIDI 2.0: discovery, protocol negotiation, Profile Configuration, and Property Exchange transactions.

sources.name: m2-102-u-common-rules-for-midi-ci-profiles
sources.title: Common Rules for MIDI-CI Profiles
sources.summary: Rules that all MIDI-CI Profiles follow: enabling/disabling profiles, profile details inquiry, and specific data messages.

sources.name: m2-103-um-common-rules-for-midi-ci-property-exchange
sources.title: Common Rules for MIDI-CI Property Exchange
sources.summary: JSON-based Property Exchange over MIDI-CI: chunking, headers, resource access (GET/SET/SUBSCRIBE), and encoding.

sources.name: m2-104-um-ump-and-midi-2-0-protocol-specification
sources.title: Universal MIDI Packet (UMP) Format and MIDI 2.0 Protocol Specification
sources.summary: The core MIDI 2.0 protocol spec: UMP packet formats (32/64/96/128-bit), message types, groups, MIDI 1.0 protocol in UMP, MIDI 2.0 channel voice messages, and MIDI 1.0 translation rules.

sources.name: m2-105-um-property-exchange-foundational-resources
sources.title: Property Exchange Foundational Resources
sources.summary: Foundational Property Exchange resources: DeviceInfo, ChannelList, JSONSchema, and ResourceList.

sources.name: m2-106-um-property-exchange-mode-resources
sources.title: Property Exchange Mode Resources
sources.summary: Property Exchange resources for device modes (ModeList, CurrentMode).

sources.name: m2-107-um-property-exchange-programlist-resource
sources.title: Property Exchange ProgramList Resource
sources.summary: Property Exchange resource for enumerating device programs (patches) with bank/program numbers.

sources.name: m2-108-um-channel-resources
sources.title: Property Exchange Channel Resources
sources.summary: Property Exchange resources describing channel state (ChannelMode, BasicChannelRx/Tx).

sources.name: m2-109-um-localon-resource
sources.title: Property Exchange LocalOn Resource
sources.summary: Property Exchange resource for Local Control on/off state.

sources.name: m2-111-um-get-and-set-device-state
sources.title: Property Exchange Get and Set Device State
sources.summary: Property Exchange mechanism for capturing and restoring full device state (snapshots).

sources.name: m2-112-um-externalsync-resource
sources.title: Property Exchange ExternalSync Resource
sources.summary: Property Exchange resource controlling external synchronization (clock source) state.

sources.name: m2-113-um-default-control-change-mapping-profile
sources.title: Default Control Change Mapping Profile
sources.summary: MIDI-CI Profile defining default Control Change mappings for MIDI 2.0 devices.

sources.name: m2-115-u-midi-2-0-bit-scaling-and-resolution
sources.title: MIDI 2.0 Bit Scaling and Resolution
sources.summary: How to translate values between MIDI 1.0 (7/14-bit) and MIDI 2.0 (16/32-bit) resolutions: min-center-max scaling and bit-repeat upscaling formulas.

sources.name: m2-116-u-midi-clip-file-specification
sources.title: MIDI Clip File Specification (SMF2CLIP)
sources.summary: File format for storing UMP/MIDI 2.0 data as clips — the first part of the Standard MIDI File 2.0 family.

sources.name: m2-117-um-property-exchange-controller-resources
sources.title: Property Exchange Controller Resources
sources.summary: Property Exchange resources describing a device's controllers (ChCtrlList, CtrlMapList).

sources.name: m2-118-um-general-midi-2-function-block-profile
sources.title: General MIDI 2 Function Block Profile
sources.summary: MIDI-CI Profile providing General MIDI 2 behavior for an entire Function Block.

sources.name: m2-119-um-general-midi-2-single-channel-profile
sources.title: General MIDI 2 Single Channel Profile
sources.summary: MIDI-CI Profile providing General MIDI 2 melodic/rhythm behavior on a single channel.

sources.name: m2-120-um-midi-polyphonic-expression-profile
sources.title: MIDI Polyphonic Expression (MPE) Profile
sources.summary: MIDI-CI Profile for MPE: per-note pitch bend, timbre, and pressure using channel rotation.

sources.name: m2-121-um-drawbar-organ-profile
sources.title: Drawbar Organ Profile
sources.summary: MIDI-CI instrument Profile standardizing drawbar organ control mappings.

sources.name: m2-122-um-rotary-speaker-profile
sources.title: Rotary Speaker Profile
sources.summary: MIDI-CI effect Profile standardizing rotary speaker control mappings.

sources.name: m2-123-um-note-on-orchestral-articulation-profile
sources.title: Note-On Orchestral Articulation Profile
sources.summary: MIDI-CI Profile using MIDI 2.0 Note On attribute data for orchestral articulations.

sources.name: m2-124-um-network-midi-2-0-udp
sources.title: Network MIDI 2.0 (UDP) Transport Specification
sources.summary: Official transport for UMP over UDP networks: session management, FEC/retransmission, and discovery.

sources.name: m2-125-um-default-drum-note-map-profile
sources.title: Default Drum Note Map Profile
sources.summary: MIDI-CI Profile standardizing drum note mappings (successor to the GM drum map).

sources.name: usb-midi-2-0-device-class
sources.title: USB Device Class Definition for MIDI Devices, Version 2.0
sources.summary: Official USB-IF class definition for USB-MIDI 2.0: UMP over USB, group terminals, and backward compatibility with USB-MIDI 1.0.

sources.name: ble-midi-specification
sources.title: Specification for MIDI over Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE-MIDI), Version 1.0
sources.summary: MIDI 1.0 over Bluetooth LE: packet encoding with timestamps and the MIDI GATT service. Community mirror — the official download on midi.org requires a free account.
